items.name: Franklin Method Ball Set
items.desc: Textured alignment balls specifically designed for deep myofascial release, improving proprioceptive bone feedback, and melting away pelvic and foot tension.

items.name: OPTP Franklin Method Fascia Roll
items.desc: A specialized, contoured roller engineered to comfortably cradle the limbs and spine, offering deep localized myofascial decompression and shoulder-rolling support.

items.name: OPTP Franklin Method Bands
items.desc: Premium, highly flexible resistance bands configured for dynamic alignment training, localized force redirection, and direct neuromuscular mapping feedback.

items.name: TriggerPoint Grid Foam Roller
items.desc: Features a multi-density exterior grid pattern over a rigid hollow core to simulate a massage therapist's hands, safely expanding thoracic spine mobility.

items.name: Balanced Body Pilates Ring
items.desc: An ultra-durable 15-inch Ultra-Fit Circle fitted with dual-sided molded padding to safely map, track, and regulate inner/outer leg alignment and core connection.

items.name: Balanced Body Balance Pad
items.desc: A stable yet reactive high-density foam block canvas designed to challenge deep ankle stabilization, multi-planar balance networks, and deep pelvic control.

items.name: Balanced Body Pilates Arc
items.desc: An ergonomic three-in-one step barrel and spine corrector designed to unpack thoracic stiffness, assist lateral flexions, and cleanly scale lower abdominal engagement.

items.name: Balanced Body Pilates Mat
items.desc: An extra-thick, dense structural fitness mat engineered with premium cushioning to protect your spine base and joint pivots throughout complex rolling movement series.

items.name: Balanced Body Magic Roller
items.desc: A highly resilient, full-length cylindrical roller built for fine balance tracking, deep postural correction, and supporting long-term structural core stability routines.

items.name: Balanced Body Pilates Moon Box
items.desc: A rigid, upholstered wooden step block used to elevate the hips, stabilize seating postures, and correctly adjust height lines during advanced apparatus or mat setups.

items.name: Pilates Parasetter
items.desc: A specialized spinal alignment cradle built with dual-channel physical reliefs to eliminate vertical rib flaring and calm overactive paraspinal muscle tension.
